typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		BillWIPID as integer,
		AlloWIPID as integer,
		WADate as timestamp,
		Allocation as decimal(19,19),
		BillCurrencyID as integer,
		BillCurrencyRate as double,
		BillCurrencyAllocation as decimal(19,19)
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT * FROM tblWAH WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE BillWIPID % 3 = 2',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource
OLEDBSource sink(input(
		WADate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Allocation as decimal(0,0),
		BillCurrencyID as integer,
		BillWIPID as integer,
		AlloWIPID as integer,
		BillCurrencyAllocation as decimal(0,0),
		BillCurrencyRate as double
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		WADate,
		Allocation,
		BillCurrencyID,
		BillWIPID,
		AlloWIPID,
		BillCurrencyAllocation,
		BillCurrencyRate)) ~> SQLServerDestination
